parameters.query:
SELECT 
    id,
    event_id,
    from_email,
    full_name,
    phone,
    current_stage,
    lead_score,
    status,
    created_at
FROM nebula_contacts
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY lead_score DESC, created_at ASC;

UPDATE nebula_contacts
SET 
    current_stage = '{{ $json.next_stage }}',
    next_stage = '{{ $json.next_stage }}',
    lead_score = {{ $json.lead_score }},
    status = '{{ $json.update_status }}',
    last_updated = NOW()
WHERE event_id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'
AND status = 'pending';

INSERT INTO nebula_funnel_log
(event_id, full_name, from_stage, 
 to_stage, action, result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.full_name }}',
  '{{ $json.current_stage }}',
  '{{ $json.next_stage }}',
  'funnel_update',
  '{{ $json.update_status }}',
  'Score: {{ $json.lead_score }} | Advanced: {{ $json.can_advance }}'
);
